qa_pairs.question: How can a user check the progress of Cloud-init on a virtual machine (VM) within the OpenStack dashboard?
qa_pairs.answer: To check the progress of Cloud-init on a VM, first select 'Project' -> 'Compute' -> 'Instances' in the left-hand menu. Then, click on the 'Instance Name' of the specific VM to view more information. Finally, select the 'Log' tab and look for lines containing 'cloud-init' to see details about the various phases of Cloud-init's operation.

qa_pairs.question: What specific log entry indicates that Cloud-init has successfully finished running on a virtual machine (VM)?
qa_pairs.answer: Cloud-init has finished running on a VM when a line similar to "Cloud-init v. 0.7.5 finished at Wed, 22 Jun 2016 17:52:29 +0000. Datasource DataSourceOpenStack [net,ver=2]. Up 44.33 seconds" appears near or at the end of the console log.
